themes.reasoning_notes: Bestow makes it an Aura, and while bestowed it grants enchanted creature +3/+3 with optional discard-based pump.
Activated ability repeatedly asks you to discard creature cards for temporary +2/+2, lightly tying it to discard/graveyard setups.
Bestow directly turns it into an Aura, and its static +3/+3 plus pump ability both enhance the enchanted creature.
It uses creature-card discard as a repeatable activation cost, but that tie to discard synergies is light and mostly incidental.
